assumptions.confluence_filter: all reachable histories repair to the same packet normal form
assumptions.history_convention: all rooted paths from E of lengths 0..3
assumptions.holonomy_filter: every reachable history has vanishing cycle sum
assumptions.repair_rule: nearest consistent packet in Hamming distance with ell-preserving tie-break
assumptions.toy_finite_constraint_stage: records kappa_toy = |Supp_pkt|-1 with no extra exclusion threshold
